extension.description:
Tinklepad v1.9.2 - Premiumize Pairing & New Categories
CUSTOM XML WINDOWS: - Beautiful golden-themed search progress window - WindowXML dialogs with threading/callbacks - Animated golden spinner/orb effect - Provider-by-provider progress bars - LINK HUB v3, ARCHIVE STREAM, PEER NETWORK, NEXUS DATABASE - Real-time source count updates
SOURCE SELECTION: - Stunning golden-themed source list - Color-coded sources (FREE=green, DDL=gold, TORRENT=orange) - Quality badges: 4K=red, 1080p=green, 720p=blue - Poster and metadata display - Smooth scrolling list
FALLBACK DIALOGS: - Automatic fallback to standard Kodi dialogs - Works on all Kodi versions/skins
DEBRID SUPPORT: - Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize - Magnet/Torrent cloud downloading
By Zeus768
extension.news:
v1.9.3 - Movie Networks & Per-Network Icons: - NEW: Networks menu added to Movies (uses TMDB watch-providers, defaults to US region) - NEW: TV Networks now show per-network placeholder icons (Netflix, Prime, Disney+, HBO, etc.) - NEW: 'watch_region' setting honored for movie streaming filters
v1.9.2 - Premiumize Pairing & New Categories: - FIX: Premiumize "Get Code" device pairing flow restored (no more manual API key required) - NEW: Choice on PM auth between device pairing (recommended) and manual API key - NEW: 5 new Movies categories - In Theatres, Upcoming, Top Rated, Documentaries, Anime - NEW: 5 new TV Shows categories - Airing Today, On The Air, Top Rated, Documentaries, Anime - NEW: Matching golden-eagle themed icons for all new categories - TMDB list_content now supports now_playing/upcoming/top_rated/airing_today/on_the_air endpoints
v1.9.0 - Extended Scrapers Edition: - NEW: EZTV.re for TV shows - NEW: RARBG mirrors/clones support - NEW: Nyaa.si for anime - NEW: LimeTorrents support - NEW: Torlock support - NEW: Comet (Stremio-style indexer) - NEW: CocoScrapers integration (optional) - NEW: GearsScrapers integration (optional) - External scraper packs auto-detected if installed - Toggle each scraper pack in settings
v1.8.6 - Submenu Bug Fix: - FIX: Submenus now open correctly (Movies, TV Shows, etc) - FIX: Resolved UnboundLocalError in main.py - Removed redundant local import causing variable scope issue
v1.8.5 - Custom Golden XML Theme: - NEW: WindowXML search dialog with golden theme - NEW: Animated golden spinner/orb animation - NEW: Provider progress bars (LINK HUB, ARCHIVE STREAM, etc) - NEW: Threading support for non-blocking UI updates - NEW: Beautiful source selection with poster display - Automatic fallback to standard dialogs if XML fails
v1.8.4: Performance & caching improvements v1.8.3: Animated loading effect v1.8.2: Custom XML window support v1.8.1: Stability fixes
